subject.name: DSA Patterns
subject.description: Master coding interviews by pattern, not by problem. Two pointers, sliding window, DP patterns, graphs, and more — with real trade-offs.

chapters.title: Big-O, Time & Space Complexity
chapters.subtitle: How to analyze algorithms — Big-O notation, amortized analysis, space trade-offs, and what interviewers actually look for in complexity answers

chapters.title: Arrays & Hashing Patterns
chapters.subtitle: Frequency maps, two-sum variants, grouping, set lookups — the pattern behind 30% of all interview questions

chapters.title: String Manipulation Patterns
chapters.subtitle: Reversal, anagram detection, palindromes, encoding/decoding — string-specific tricks that come up constantly

chapters.title: Two Pointers
chapters.subtitle: Converging, diverging, and same-direction pointers — sorted arrays, pair sums, container problems, partitioning

chapters.title: Sliding Window
chapters.subtitle: Fixed and variable-size windows — longest/shortest subarray, max sum, substring problems in O(n)

chapters.title: Fast & Slow Pointers
chapters.subtitle: Floyd's cycle detection, finding the middle, detecting loops in linked lists and sequences

chapters.title: Binary Search Patterns
chapters.subtitle: Classic, rotated arrays, search space reduction, "minimum X that satisfies Y" — the binary search you actually need

chapters.title: Sorting Algorithms & Custom Comparators
chapters.subtitle: Merge sort, quick sort, counting sort — plus custom comparators for interview problems like largest number

chapters.title: Prefix Sum & Difference Arrays
chapters.subtitle: Range sum queries, subarray sums equal to K, 2D prefix sums — turn O(n) queries into O(1)

chapters.title: Stack Patterns & Monotonic Stack
chapters.subtitle: Next greater element, valid parentheses, min stack, histogram problems — monotonic stack is the hidden gem

chapters.title: Deque, Monotonic Deque & Queue
chapters.subtitle: Sliding window max/min with deque, BFS queues, circular buffer — deque is the secret weapon for O(n) window problems

chapters.title: Linked List Patterns
chapters.subtitle: Reversal, merge, cycle detection, reorder, partition — the 7 patterns that cover every linked list question

chapters.title: Binary Tree Traversals & Properties
chapters.subtitle: Inorder, preorder, postorder, level-order, zigzag — plus diameter, depth, views, symmetric checks, and balanced verification

chapters.title: BST, Construction & Serialization
chapters.subtitle: Validate BST, insert/delete, LCA, Kth smallest — plus construct from traversals, serialize/deserialize, and sorted array/list to BST

chapters.title: Tree Paths & Modifications
chapters.subtitle: Path sum I/II/III, max path sum, root-to-leaf — plus invert, flatten, populate next pointers, and merge trees

chapters.title: Trie & Prefix Trees
chapters.subtitle: Autocomplete, word search, prefix matching — implement a trie and know when it beats a hash map

chapters.title: Graph BFS & DFS Patterns
chapters.subtitle: Number of islands, clone graph, bipartite check, flood fill — the two traversals that solve 80% of graph problems

chapters.title: Shortest Path Algorithms
chapters.subtitle: Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford, Floyd-Warshall, cheapest flights — when to use each, negative weights, and K-stop constraints

chapters.title: Topological Sort & DAGs
chapters.subtitle: Course schedule, alien dictionary, build order — Kahn's BFS and DFS-based approaches for dependency resolution

chapters.title: Union-Find & Minimum Spanning Trees
chapters.subtitle: Disjoint set with path compression + union by rank, accounts merge, redundant connection — plus Kruskal's and Prim's MST algorithms

chapters.title: SCCs, Bridges & Articulation Points
chapters.subtitle: Kosaraju's and Tarjan's algorithms for strongly connected components, critical connections, bridges — advanced graph connectivity

chapters.title: DP Fundamentals
chapters.subtitle: Memoization vs tabulation, identifying overlapping subproblems, state definition, recurrence relations — the framework before the patterns

chapters.title: Linear DP & Kadane's Algorithm
chapters.subtitle: Climbing stairs, house robber, coin change, max subarray, max product subarray — 1D state problems and the Kadane's family

chapters.title: Knapsack: 0/1 & Unbounded
chapters.subtitle: Subset sum, partition equal subset, target sum, coin change 2, ones and zeroes — each item once vs unlimited reuse

chapters.title: String DP & LCS
chapters.subtitle: Edit distance, word break, LCS, shortest common supersequence, palindrome partitioning, distinct subsequences — two-string table problems

chapters.title: LIS & Sequence DP
chapters.subtitle: Longest increasing subsequence (O(n log n)), Russian doll envelopes, longest chain, wiggle subsequence, delete and earn

chapters.title: Grid DP & 2D Traversal
chapters.subtitle: Unique paths, minimum path sum, maximal square, cherry pickup, dungeon game — grid traversal with cumulative state

chapters.title: Interval DP
chapters.subtitle: Burst balloons, stone game, minimum score triangulation, palindrome partitioning II — DP on ranges trying every split point

chapters.title: DP on Trees
chapters.subtitle: House robber III, binary tree cameras, max BST sum, longest zigzag — combining DFS traversal with DP state transitions

chapters.title: Bitmask & Digit DP
chapters.subtitle: TSP, partition to K equal subsets, shortest path visiting all nodes, numbers with repeated digits — encoding state as bitmasks and digit constraints

chapters.title: Multi-Dimension & State Machine DP
chapters.subtitle: Stock buy/sell series, dice rolls, frog jump, knight dialer, graph DP — problems with 2-3 state dimensions and state transitions

chapters.title: Greedy Algorithms & Proof Patterns
chapters.subtitle: Activity selection, jump game, gas station — the greedy choice property and how to prove correctness in interviews

chapters.title: Backtracking
chapters.subtitle: Subsets, permutations, combinations, N-Queens, Sudoku — the template that solves every generate-all-solutions problem

chapters.title: Heap & Priority Queue (Top-K)
chapters.subtitle: Kth largest, merge K sorted lists, median of stream — min-heap vs max-heap and the top-K pattern

chapters.title: Intervals & Scheduling
chapters.subtitle: Merge intervals, insert interval, meeting rooms — sort by start/end and sweep line technique

chapters.title: Bit Manipulation Tricks
chapters.subtitle: Single number, counting bits, power of two, XOR tricks — bitwise operations that turn O(n) into O(1)

chapters.title: Math & Number Theory
chapters.subtitle: GCD, primes, modular arithmetic, random sampling — the math patterns that show up in unexpected places

chapters.title: Design Data Structures
chapters.subtitle: LRU Cache, LFU Cache, Min Stack, RandomizedSet — combine multiple data structures into one elegant design

chapters.title: Segment Trees & Fenwick Trees
chapters.subtitle: Range queries and point updates in O(log n) — when prefix sums aren't enough and you need dynamic updates
